testcase.name: Select the first checkbox
testcase.system-out: Given I open the checkboxes page............................................passed When I select the first checkbox............................................passed Then the first checkbox should be selected..................................passed

testcase.name: Select an option from the dropdown
testcase.system-out: Given I am on the dropdown page.............................................passed When I select "Option 1" from the dropdown..................................passed Then I should see "Option 1" selected.......................................passed

testcase.name: Search for a term
testcase.system-out: Given I am on the Google search page........................................passed When I search for "GitHub"..................................................passed Then I should see "GitHub" in the results...................................passed

testcase.name: Successful login
testcase.system-out: Given I open the login page.................................................passed When I enter valid username and password....................................passed And I click the login button................................................passed Then I should see the secure area...........................................passed
